channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Collabotage
item.description:
Rotglob's chili cook-off revs up as the dusty do-gooders work to save its denizen's dreams.

Duration: 2:07:18

Tags: Dimension 20, Gladlands, mad max, post apocalyptic, dystopian, chaos, driving, cars, motorcycles, frog and toad, paddington bear, wholesome, optimism, cheerful, cozy, charming, friendship, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, ally beardsley, kimia behpoornia, vic michaelis, oscar montoya, zac oyama, jacob wysocki, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Fake It Till You Fake It
item.description:
The Carer Van arrives to the overworked town of Rotglob, but stress and potential sabotage awaits.

Duration: 1:50:36

Tags: Dimension 20, Gladlands, mad max, post apocalyptic, dystopian, chaos, driving, cars, motorcycles, climate change, frog and toad, paddington bear, wholesome, optimism, cheerful, cozy, charming, friendship, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, ally beardsley, kimia behpoornia, vic michaelis, oscar montoya, zac oyama, jacob wysocki, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Welcome to the Wastes
item.description:
In an apocalyptic world, a team of do-gooders seek to put a little hospitality in the inhospitable.

Duration: 1:45:32
